task_completion.description: IntelliJ IDEA is open with the undo-redo-app project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: IntelliJ IDEA window is visible, and the Project tool window shows the undo-redo-app directory structure.

task_completion.description: The com.editor.command package and required classes are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Project tool window shows the com.editor.command package containing Command, InsertCommand, DeleteCommand, ReplaceCommand, and CommandHistory Java files.

task_completion.description: The Command pattern classes are implemented with execute and undo logic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The editor shows the contents of Command.java (with execute/undo methods) or one of the concrete command classes (e.g., InsertCommand) implementing the interface and calling TextEditor methods.

task_completion.description: Main.java is completed with the required operations and file writing logic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The editor shows Main.java executing Insert, Insert, Replace, two Undos, and one Redo, and writing the states to output.txt.

task_completion.description: The project compiles and runs successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Run tool window or terminal shows successful execution of Main without compilation errors or runtime exceptions.

task_completion.description: output.txt is generated with the recorded text states.
task_completion.visual_evidence: output.txt is visible in the project root directory in the Project tool window, or its contents are displayed in the editor showing multiple text states.

integrity.description: The agent used IntelliJ IDEA to write the code.
integrity.visual_evidence: Code is visible in the IntelliJ IDEA editor, not just terminal commands like echo or cat.

integrity.description: The agent did not hardcode the final output strings directly into output.txt.
integrity.visual_evidence: Main.java contains logic to get the text state from the TextEditor instance and write it to the file, rather than hardcoded strings.

integrity.description: The output file was generated by running the Java program.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Run tool window shows the execution of Main.java, and output.txt appears in the project tree after execution.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory: /home/ga/IdeaProjects/undo-redo-app. Required files in src/main/java/com/editor/command/: Command.java, InsertCommand.java, DeleteCommand.java, ReplaceCommand.java, CommandHistory.java. Main.java must execute 3 operations (Insert, Insert, Replace), 2 undos, 1 redo, and write states to output.txt in the project root. TextEditor provides insert(int position, String text), delete(int position, int length), replace(int position, int length, String newText), and getText().
